mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, product_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.image_url AS image_url, p.price, c.quantity, p.stock, p.status, c.create_time, c.update_time FROM cart c LEFT JOIN products p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
SELECT quantity FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
